findings.title: Commission lifecycle hooks run outside transaction
findings.issue: Commission state transitions run after the order status transaction commits. If commission update fails, order/commission status become inconsistent.
findings.suggestion: Move commission operations inside the transaction or add a retry queue.
findings.impact: Silent inconsistency between order and commission states in rare failure cases.

findings.title: No input validation on coupon code proposal
findings.issue: No length, format, or character validation on proposed coupon codes.
findings.impact: Special characters could leak into URLs or email templates.

findings.title: Admin coupon approval has no value bounds check
findings.issue: No validation that percentage <= 100 or values are positive.
findings.impact: Invalid discount values could cause negative order totals.

fixesApplied.original: Email notifications are defined but never wired (HIGH, confidence 95)
fixesApplied.fix: Injected EmailService into CheckoutService, OrdersService, and CommissionsService. All 5 email events now fire at the correct lifecycle points.

fixesApplied.original: No backend validation on registration password length (HIGH, confidence 90)
fixesApplied.fix: Added password length check (min 8 chars) in ResellerAuthService.register() with BadRequestException.
